ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the tournament */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the tournament is held */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight or rank of the tournament */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of tournament (e.g., Ranking, Premier) */,
  "qualified" TEXT /* Qualification criteria for players */,
  "max_points" INTEGER /* Maximum points available for the tournament */,
  "max_prize" INTEGER /* Maximum prize money for the tournament */,
  "registration_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of tournament registration */,
  "registration_end_date" TEXT /* End date of tournament registration */,
  "tournament_format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament (e.g., single elimination, round robin) */,
  "entry_fee" INTEGER /* Entry fee for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES tournament_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the tournament is held */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the tournament is held */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue hosting the tournament */,
  "venue_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "venue_address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region the player is from */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking or skill level of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the platform */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's performance */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the player in the tournament */,
  "prize_won" INTEGER /* Prize money won by the player in the tournament */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Placement of the player in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament receiving sponsorship */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of sponsorship money */,
  "sponsorship_type" TEXT /* Type of sponsorship (e.g., cash, equipment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Name of the organizer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organizer */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization representing the organizer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_organizers" (
  "tournament_organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between tournament and organizer */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_organizers_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_organizers_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament result */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "placement" INTEGER /* Placement of the player in the tournament */,
  "prize_money" INTEGER /* Prize money won by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_results_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between player and team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES player_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_team_memberships_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
